isoCertificate.note: EXPIRED as of site build date (July 2026) — do not display as current without a renewed certificate. Confirm renewal status with the owner before publishing this badge.

about: PS Laboratories is an independent research-driven company specialized in the custom synthesis of pharmacopeia and non-pharmacopeia reference standards, impurities, and APIs. It provides well-characterized reference standards essential to ensure accuracy and validity of analytical methods used within the pharmaceutical industry.
mission: To become a reliable partner by offering high-quality reference standards, impurities, research chemicals and custom synthesis services in a time-bound manner and at a reasonable cost.
vision: To fortify businesses with holistic solutions, implementing the best service standards.

expertiseAreas.title: Custom Synthesis / Bulk Chemicals
expertiseAreas.description: If you can draw a chemical structure, PS Laboratories will make it in the flask — custom synthesis from milligrams to a few kilograms, including retrosynthesis of the target structure and route/chemistry definition where no literature process exists.

expertiseAreas.title: Custom Research
expertiseAreas.description: Cost-effective, accurate custom research services covering chemical research and organic synthesis, including multistep synthesis, process scouting, process optimization, and product development.

expertiseAreas.title: Impurities
expertiseAreas.description: Impurity synthesis and identification is a core activity, including custom synthesis orders for impurities at gram levels, backed by deep understanding of reaction mechanisms responsible for specific impurity generation.

expertiseAreas.title: In-house R&D product range
expertiseAreas.description: Process Impurities, Degradation Impurities, Potential Impurities, Genotoxic Impurities, Metabolites, MedChem Compounds.

expertiseAreas.title: Services
expertiseAreas.description: HPLC purification, degradation & isolation of impurities, structure elucidation/identification, custom synthesis (mg to gram scale).

whyChooseUs: Custom Pack Sizes as per requirement
ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management system (pending renewal — see note above)
enquiryChecklist: Chemical or IUPAC Name — helps identify the exact standard required (often available from the respective pharmacopeia)
CAS number — a unique identifier, if available
Chemical structure — if available, helps identify the exact impurity standard
Quantity required — helps determine availability and provide an accurate quotation
